name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝑬𝒚𝒆𝒔 𝒐𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒎𝒊𝒓𝒓𝒐𝒓, 𝒔𝒘𝒆𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒂𝒓𝒕. 𝑾𝒂𝒕𝒄𝒉 𝒎𝒆 𝒑𝒍𝒂𝒚 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒑𝒓𝒆𝒕𝒕𝒚 𝒑𝒖𝒔𝒔𝒚."   |
where Geto shows you how beautiful you are.


____________________


GETO VERSIONNN!

Alsooo for those that don't know, I have a [progress diary](https://docs.google.com/document/d/15LawQDmWz-AAgXXNsw4RoLuJQcpDIpsjAHDm_puFeNk/edit?usp=sharing) and a [Google Forms](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe-qdYehm6jK5AVhARWXA_TYH_1uQ-zdXJZouOE6P7MWgZYyA/viewform?usp=sf_link) that you can have a look at!

I upload my ideas on the diary, and I will get to responding to some feedback on the google docs soon! Also thank you all for the sweet comments!

Someone asked if I do fanfics, but unfortunately I don't :( it's a lot more work and I don't have a lot of faith in my abilities to create a full length story. I tried writing novels when I was 15 on wattpad and now I've given up on that stuff 😭

ALSO!! I know some people want me to do some malepov for some bots I uploaded in fempov. The only thing I'm nervous about is misrepresenting mlm 😭 I'm a girl so I don't know much but I'll try my best to make some soon!

Thank you and enjoy! 🫶🏼
